metadata_policy.description_strategy: Codex-only, trigger-first summaries; Claude descriptions remain unchanged

project-only.summary: Install no global marketplace skills; rely on the current project's .agents/skills mirror.

build.summary: Code navigation, convergence, execution, and session orientation.

all.summary: Every generated skill; use only when the full roster is needed.

capabilities.summary: Codex lowering for user choice gates such as AskUserQuestion.

scripts/lib/codex-compat.mjs#lowerWorkerProse replaces the exact Agent-call / subagent_type=Explore / subagent_type=general-purpose / hyphenated sub-agent(s) constructs with Codex worker vocabulary (read-only explorer worker, scoped executor worker). Ratcheted to zero across all generated output (codex-compatibility Phase 1).

scripts/lib/codex-compat.mjs#lowerFrontmatter strips disable-model-invocation from Codex frontmatter and injects an explicit body-level invocation-policy paragraph near the top of the skill. Ratcheted to zero across all generated output (codex-compatibility Phase 1).

scripts/lib/codex-compat.mjs#lowerFrontmatter strips model: sonnet from Codex frontmatter and injects an execution-tier note (delegate to the configured executor role where available, else run inline and report the degradation); lowerWorkerProse also rewrites remaining body-prose mentions of the removed field. Ratcheted to zero across all generated output (codex-compatibility Phase 1).
Codex lowering for browser-verifier and browser automation references.

scripts/lib/codex-compat.mjs#createProjectGuidanceLowerer moves the existing CLAUDE.md->AGENTS.md + namespace-flatten rewrites here and adds /init-assumption softening (Claude Code's built-in /init -> generic architecture-enrichment phrasing, no Claude-only command claim). claude_built_in and claude_init categories ratcheted to zero (codex-compatibility Phase 1).
Codex lowering for session-open and runs-on-open claims.

denylisted_unresolved_tokens.label: session_open_awareness / session-open claim
denylisted_unresolved_tokens.pattern: session-open|runs on every open|runs on open
